name: per_team_pass_play multi-year-no-split with partial weeks per year (wrap-CTE partial-scope regression)
description: Regression: when a player-cell view selects multiple years AND a partial week subset per year (weeks 1-4 of 2023 and 2024) without a year split, the multi-year-no-split wrap must propagate the nfl_week_id IN-list to BOTH the (off, year)-grain denominator CTE and the per-(pid, year) numerator subquery. The view-scope helper (apply_scope_to_query) emits nfl_week_id when the IN-list is narrower than full (year x seas_type) coverage; this test pins that the partial-week predicate reaches both arms of the wrap so the denominator does not silently sum weeks 5+ while the numerator scopes to 1-4. Companion to per-team-pass-play-multi-year-no-split.json (full-year wrap) and per-team-pass-play-partial-week-single-year.json (single-year partial, non-wrap).
expected_query: with "ta5dca3756129e716384c738c83b9e691" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."off", COUNT(*) as rate_type_total_count, "nfl_plays"."year" from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "play_type" = 'PASS' and "nfl_plays"."nfl_week_id" in ('2023_REG_WEEK_1', '2023_REG_WEEK_2', '2023_REG_WEEK_3', '2023_REG_WEEK_4', '2024_REG_WEEK_1', '2024_REG_WEEK_2', '2024_REG_WEEK_3', '2024_REG_WEEK_4') and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023, 2024) group by "nfl_plays"."off", "nfl_plays"."year"), "player_year_teams" as materialized (select "pid", "year", (array_agg(tm ORDER BY game_count DESC, tm ASC))[1] as team from (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm", count(*) as "game_count" from "player_gamelogs" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2023, 2024) and "player_gamelogs"."year" in (2023, 2024) group by "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm") as "player_year_team_counts" group by "pid", "year"), "per_team_play_wrap_td3e9a59c3e428d9f2c86da07586ae05c" as materialized (select "num_y"."pid", SUM(num_y.measure_total) AS numerator_sum, SUM(ta5dca3756129e716384c738c83b9e691.rate_type_total_count) AS denominator_sum from (select "nfl_games"."year", nfl_plays.trg_pid AS pid, SUM(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.comp = true THEN nfl_plays.recv_yds ELSE 0 END) AS measure_total from "nfl_plays" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "nfl_plays"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."nfl_week_id" in ('2023_REG_WEEK_1', '2023_REG_WEEK_2', '2023_REG_WEEK_3', '2023_REG_WEEK_4', '2024_REG_WEEK_1', '2024_REG_WEEK_2', '2024_REG_WEEK_3', '2024_REG_WEEK_4') and "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2023, 2024) and not "nfl_plays"."play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."nfl_week_id" in ('2023_REG_WEEK_1', '2023_REG_WEEK_2', '2023_REG_WEEK_3', '2023_REG_WEEK_4', '2024_REG_WEEK_1', '2024_REG_WEEK_2', '2024_REG_WEEK_3', '2024_REG_WEEK_4') and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') group by nfl_plays.trg_pid, "nfl_games"."year") as "num_y" inner join "player_year_teams" on "player_year_teams"."pid" = "num_y"."pid" and "player_year_teams"."year" = "num_y"."year" inner join "ta5dca3756129e716384c738c83b9e691" on "ta5dca3756129e716384c738c83b9e691"."off" = "player_year_teams"."team" and "ta5dca3756129e716384c738c83b9e691"."year" = "num_y"."year" group by "num_y"."pid") select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, CAST(MAX(per_team_play_wrap_td3e9a59c3e428d9f2c86da07586ae05c.numerator_sum) AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(MAX(per_team_play_wrap_td3e9a59c3e428d9f2c86da07586ae05c.denominator_sum) AS DECIMAL), 0) AS rec_yds_from_plays_0, "player"."pos" from "player" left join "per_team_play_wrap_td3e9a59c3e428d9f2c86da07586ae05c" on "per_team_play_wrap_td3e9a59c3e428d9f2c86da07586ae05c"."pid" = "player"."pid" where player.pos IN ('WR') group by player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
